projectDescription: Veritrix is an AI agent observability platform that traces, replays, and diagnoses failures across multi-agent systems — like Datadog, but purpose-built for AI agents.
keyFeatures: Multi-agent trace waterfall — full timeline across every agent and span
Time-travel replay — rewind to any decision and inspect exact inputs/outputs
Root-cause summaries — plain-language diagnosis of what broke and why
Token & cost tracking — per-agent, per-span cost attribution
Alerting on failure patterns — Slack, PagerDuty, or webhook notifications
Audit-grade export — PDF or CSV with timestamps and provenance hashes
OpenTelemetry-native — no lock-in, works with any OTel-compatible runtime
Framework integrations — LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI Agents SDK, LlamaIndex, CAMEL-AI
publicApiSurface: trace spans: llm.call, tool.exec, agent.handoff, llm.retry
Span payload fields: span, duration_ms, input_tokens, output_tokens, status, error
Trace metadata: trace_id, span_count, duration, tokens, cost
